issues.detail: Instructions are not specific and lack clear guidance for users.
Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
Skill lacks concrete procedures or runnable code for users to follow.

scenarios.name: Auth flow sequence diagram
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produces a bare sequenceDiagram missing participant declarations, alt/else branching, and proper ->>/-->> arrow syntax; treatment matches SKILL.md structure with actor, participants, and alt/else for valid vs invalid credentials.

scenarios.name: E-commerce ERD
scenarios.rationale: Baseline omits cardinality notation, PK/FK annotations, typed columns, and labeled relationships; treatment uses ||--o{ / ||--|{ with PK/FK and verb-phrase labels as shown in the SKILL.md erDiagram example.
